planner.description: Produces per-ticket implementation plans working within the existing architecture. Read-only. Never makes architecture decisions.

solutions-architect.description: Designs overall solution structure, chooses technologies, defines high-level architecture, maintains architecture docs.

coding-agent.description: Implements production code following AGENTS.md standards and the plan.

test-specialist.description: Writes and maintains {{TEST_FRAMEWORK}} unit tests using the {{TEST_SKILL}} skill.

reviewer.description: Read-only code review: checks standards, patterns, tests, and architecture compliance.

cleanup-agent.description: Final cleanup pass: add minimal instructive comments, remove AI conversational artifacts, organize imports, fix whitespace.

ticket.description: Start work on a ticket, e.g. /ticket TICKET1
ticket.template: Read docs/Tasks/{arg}-*/requirement.md and docs/Tasks/{arg}-*/status.md (if exists). Follow the workflow in AGENTS.md. Use sub-agents: @planner -> @coding-agent -> @test-specialist -> @reviewer -> @solutions-architect -> @cleanup-agent. Present the plan to the user after @planner, show changes after @coding-agent, show test results after @test-specialist, and ask about commit at the end. Collect doc flags from each agent and pass them to @solutions-architect. After completing, update status.md with progress.
